name: Lasagna in a Bun
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut thin slices off tops of buns.
2. Hollow out centers, leaving 1/4 inch thick shells; discard tops and center or save for another use.
3. In a skillet, brown ground beef over medium heat until no longer pink.
4. Drain excess fat from the skillet.
5. Add spaghetti sauce, garlic powder, and Italian seasoning to the skillet.
6. Cook 4-5 minutes or until heated through.
7. Meanwhile, combine ricotta, Parmesan, half of the Cheddar and Mozzarella cheeses; mix well.
8. Spoon meat sauce into buns.
9. Top with cheese mixture.
10. Place on a baking sheet.
11. Cover loosely with foil.
12. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until the cheese melts.
Attribution: Taste of Home Magazine, April/May 1995
